--- revoke_usage_on_schema_default.sql
REVOKE USAGE ON SCHEMA DEFAULT FROM ROLE public

--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.UsagePrivilegeOnSchema{
    Usage:   7,
    Default: 23,
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 41,
      NameEnd: 47,
      Name:    "public",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE USAGE ON SCHEMA DEFAULT FROM ROLE public
